name: reviewer-extras
description: Extra review types for the reviewer framework that depend on other plugins

interface.shortDescription: Composite review types that extend the reviewer framework.
interface.longDescription: Adds cross-plugin review workflows such as Codex-backed review and CLAUDE.md review on top of the reviewer framework.
defaultPrompt: Review this change with Codex-backed analysis.
Check the CLAUDE.md files for structure and quality.
Show which extra review workflows this repo can use.
